calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Trust Property
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Robert Anderson appearing for and with petitioner Benjamin Tucker. Issues addressed. Court is inclined to grant the petition but he wants to make sure that he has the authority to do so. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
